conflict: Silas needs Gideon's money to keep himself and Junie afloat, but the work now requires stealing from the people Inez asked him to honor.
consequence: Silas knowingly participates in stripping neighborhood names for commercial use, becoming complicit in dispossession rather than merely adjacent to it.
must_land_beats: Make clear that Gideon values stickiness over truth and sees folk knowledge as raw material.
Let Silas enjoy parts of the collecting game so his failure is not falsely noble.
Show neighborhoods offering decoys, jokes, and strategic nonsense as a form of self-defense.
Stage the moment Silas memorizes a real ward name without permission as a conscious moral crossing.
End with stolen names appearing overnight in Gideon's campaign materials.
pressure_source: Silas needs Gideon's money to keep himself and Junie afloat, but the work now requires stealing from the people Inez asked him to honor.
state_shift: Silas knowingly participates in stripping neighborhood names for commercial use, becoming complicit in dispossession rather than merely adjacent to it.
